<div align="center">
    <h1>【 Crosszay's fork of end_4's Hyprland dotfiles 】</h1>
    <h3></h3>
</div>

This repo can be used to create a near-identical copy of my personal desktop. 

## Installation
The easiest way to install this repo is to run the command below
~~~
cd ~ && git clone https://github.com/crosszay1/my-dots-hyprland.git && cd my-dots-hyprland && ./setup install
~~~
## Importiant
I use an arch-based distro, and your setup may look different from mine if it is not.
